description: Pre-implementation coverage baseline for IFC-212 (Wire API container to QueueAIService for BullMQ-backed lead scoring). Backend-only task — creates apps/api/src/services/queue/{QueueAIService.ts,index.ts,__tests__/QueueAIService.test.ts}, creates apps/api/src/modules/lead/__tests__/LeadService.queue-ai.test.ts, creates apps/ai-worker/src/jobs/__tests__/scoring.job.contract.test.ts, modifies apps/api/src/container.ts AI-provider branching block (lines 266-290), modifies docs/architecture/diagrams/ai-intelligence-dependency-chain.md. Target: 21 new tests with statements>=90%, branches>=80%, functions>=90%, lines>=90% on src/services/queue/** (apps/api scope).
measurement_scope: apps/api/src/container.ts (MODIFIED — default base AI service flips from LiteLLMAIService to QueueAIService)
command: Pre-impl baseline derived from current master HEAD. New files (QueueAIService.ts, index.ts) do not exist yet — coverage of NEW code is 0% by construction at baseline. The single MODIFIED file (container.ts) is covered by existing apps/api/src/__tests__/container.test.ts which already exercises the createServices() / getApiPrisma() paths. AFTER snapshot IFC-212-after.json will be a fresh scoped vitest --coverage run on src/services/queue/** at exec Phase 4.2.

lines.note: no lines exist yet for src/services/queue/** — measured post-impl

apps/api/src/container.ts.note: container.ts:266-290 AI-provider branch modified to add QueueAIService default. Existing test suite exercises createServices() instantiation.

notes: Baseline file pcts are indicative; the AFTER snapshot is the binding reference for the coverage-gte-90 gate.
IFC-212 introduces 21 NEW tests (12 QueueAIService unit + 6 LeadService.queue-ai integration + 3 scoring.job.contract DTO).
Per plan §Step 4.2, the after-snapshot will be captured with `--coverage.include='src/services/queue/**'` for the apps/api scope.
Cross-package contract test in apps/ai-worker exercises ScoringJobDataSchema parsing — adds nothing to apps/api coverage but anchors worker DTO drift detection.
